user.title: Setup Global Settings
user.description:
Configure the global settings for dashboard casting.

After setup, you can add devices from the integration page.

data_description.logging_level: Use 'Warning' normally. Switch to 'Debug' when troubleshooting — it logs a lot.
data_description.cast_delay: How often each device is checked (5-300 seconds). Lower = more responsive, higher = less load.
data_description.start_time: 24-hour format — casting starts at this time by default. Can be overridden per device.
data_description.end_time: 24-hour format — casting stops at this time by default. Can be overridden per device.
data_description.switch_entity_id: Entity that enables or disables casting for all devices
data_description.switch_entity_state: State that enables casting. Leave blank for defaults (on, true, home, open)
data_description.enable_notifications: Show a notification when a device becomes unreachable

error.invalid_device_name: Please enter a valid device name (letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, underscores only)
error.device_name_too_long: Device name is too long (maximum 100 characters)
error.device_already_exists: A device with this name already exists
error.device_name_or_ip_required: Please provide at least a Device Name or an IP Address
error.invalid_url_format: Invalid URL format. Please enter a valid URL
error.invalid_url_scheme: URL must start with http:// or https://
error.entity_not_found: Entity not found in Home Assistant

init.title: Global Settings

data_description.logging_level: Use 'Warning' normally. Switch to 'Debug' when troubleshooting — it logs a lot.
data_description.cast_delay: How often each device is checked (5-300 seconds). Lower = more responsive, higher = less load.
data_description.start_time: 24-hour format — casting starts at this time by default. Can be overridden per device.
data_description.end_time: 24-hour format — casting stops at this time by default. Can be overridden per device.
data_description.switch_entity_id: Entity that enables or disables casting for all devices
data_description.switch_entity_state: State that enables casting. Leave blank for defaults (on, true, home, open)
data_description.enable_notifications: Show a notification when a device becomes unreachable

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found in Home Assistant

user.title: Add New Device
user.description:
Configure your Chromecast device. Provide a **Device Name** (from Google Home), an **IP Address**, or both. At least one is required.

Optionally set an **Alias** to give the device a custom display name.

data_description.device_name: Chromecast name from Google Home (e.g., 'Living Room Display')
data_description.device_ip: Direct IP address (e.g., '192.168.1.50'). If both are set, IP is tried first.
data_description.device_alias: Optional friendly name shown in the UI (e.g., 'Kitchen TV')

add_dashboard.title: Add Dashboard to {device_name}
add_dashboard.description:
Configure a dashboard to cast to this device.

**Dashboards added:** {dashboard_count}

data.enable_time_window: Use a custom casting time window
data.include_speaker_groups: Pause casting when a speaker group is active
data.add_another: Add another dashboard after this one

data_description.volume: Device volume when casting (0 = silent, 100 = max)
data_description.start_time: 24-hour format — the dashboard starts casting at this time each day
data_description.end_time: 24-hour format — the dashboard stops casting at this time each day
data_description.switch_entity_id: Entity that enables or disables casting for this device
data_description.switch_entity_state: State that enables casting. Leave blank for defaults (on, true, home, open)
data_description.speaker_groups: Comma-separated list of speaker group names to check
